example.en: I will compensate you for that amount.
example.vi: Tôi sẽ bù lại cho bạn số tiền đó.

definitions.es: compensar o hacer algo para recuperar lo que se ha perdido o falta.
definitions.vi: bù là bù đắp hoặc làm gì đó để bù lại cho cái đã mất hoặc thiếu.
definitions.en: to compensate or make up for something lost or lacking.

exampleSentences: Em sẽ làm việc thêm giờ để bù cho ngày nghỉ hôm qua.
Anh mua quà cho chị để bù lỗi đã quên sinh nhật.
Chúng ta có thể học thêm vào cuối tuần để bù bài đã mất.
notes_md:
**bù** = to make up for, compensate, fill in what’s missing or lost. It’s used when something wasn’t enough and you want to fix or balance it.

It’s a verb. You usually **bù + something** (bù tiền, bù thời gian) or **bù cho + someone/something** when saying who receives the compensation.


You’ll also see **bù lại** = in return / to make up for it.  
Close word: **đền (bù)** — more about paying for damage or fault, often stronger and more serious than just “bù.”

translation.en: She wants to compensate for the mistake.

content.sentence: Cô ấy muốn ___ cho lỗi lầm.

translation.en: He will compensate for the effort.

content.sentence: Anh ấy sẽ ___ cho sự cố gắng.

notes:
bù = to make up for, compensate, fill in what’s missing or lost. It’s used when something wasn’t enough and you want to fix or balance it.

It’s a verb. You usually bù + something (bù tiền, bù thời gian) or bù cho + someone/something when saying who receives the compensation.

You’ll also see bù lại = in return / to make up for it.  
Close word: đền (bù) — more about paying for damage or fault, often stronger and more serious than just “bù.”
exampleSentencesTranslated: I will work overtime to make up for yesterday's day off.
He buys her a gift to make up for forgetting the birthday.
We can study more on the weekend to make up for the lessons missed.
